title: 8BitDo SN30pro Controlify Textures
description: Replaces the glyps and controller textures to match the 8bitdo SN30pro's colour scheme and layout!
body:
This is a resource pack to replace the included Switch Pro Controller and Xbox One glyps and controller sprites with ones that match the 8BitDo SN30pro. As of now only the "G Classic Edition" colour scheme has been added, the others may be added in a future update. 

Credit goes to Andrew Grant for the original controller sprites included in Controlify, the default SNES sprite being used as a basis for these SN30pro controller sprites.
